name: All American Meat Loaf
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees.
2. In a large bowl, combine ground sirloin, eggs, oatmeal, onion soup mix, horseradish, salt, pepper, ketchup, and milk. Mix until well combined.
3. Pour the mixture into a Pam-sprayed loaf pan.
4. Spread glaze evenly over the top of the meat loaf.
5. Bake in the preheated oven for 1 hour and 15 minutes.
